description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named tools that runs on push to the tools branch. The workflow has two jobs: iwyu and clang-tidy, both running on ubuntu-latest with a 60-minute timeout and continuing on error. The iwyu job installs LLVM and Clang, compiles include-what-you-use, and then compiles and tests a project using iwyu. The clang-tidy job compiles and tests the same project using clang-tidy.
